name: slides
description: A 5-skill pack for going from a vague idea to a finished, on-brand, slop-free .pptx deck. 4 user-invocable skills: teach-slides, narrative, build-deck, slop-check.

interface.shortDescription: From a vague idea to a finished, on-brand, slop-free PowerPoint deck.
interface.longDescription: Five skills that work standalone or chained: teach-slides onboards you to presentation craft; narrative shapes a vague idea into a tight deck story; build-deck renders an on-brand .pptx; slop-check audits a deck for generic, AI-flavoured slop. presentation-craft is the shared knowledge base behind all of them.
